overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dystopian urban street with mixed architecture. The player moves along a wet asphalt road past commercial buildings with large Japanese billboards, turns right at an intersection, and crosses toward a residential area with dilapidated housing.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street observing the commercial buildings and billboards ahead

entered.detail: large building with red and blue Japanese signage and graffiti on lower walls
rusted elevated highway or monorail tracks spanning across the background
tall palm tree on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit urban street in a dystopian city, walking past palm trees and street lamps. A prominent commercial building with large Japanese billboards dominates the left side, while an elevated highway structure looms in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with digital advertising towers

events.description: camera begins turning right while continuing forward, approaching the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking forward while rotating view to survey the intersection and oncoming traffic

notable_agents.action: red truck driving away down the street ahead

entered.detail: tall orange structure with multiple digital screens displaying advertisements
tall contemporary glass building rising behind the intersection

segments.scene_description: As the camera approaches the intersection, it turns right to reveal a large digital billboard tower. The commercial building with Japanese signage moves to the far left and begins to exit the frame, while a red truck drives away in the distance and modern skyscrapers become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street corner with dilapidated housing

events.description: pedestrian crosses the street from left to right in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while continuing to turn right toward the residential buildings

notable_agents.action: person in light clothing crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: dilapidated single-story house with weathered wood siding and broken windows

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the intersection where a pedestrian walks across the path. The commercial building with billboards exits the frame left, replaced by a dilapidated residential building on the right. The digital billboard tower moves to the far left as the view opens toward the elevated highway structure ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit dystopian city that shifts from a commercial district into a dilapidated residential area. It begins by walking along an urban street past palm trees and street lamps, with a prominent commercial building featuring large Japanese billboards and an elevated highway looming in the background. As the camera approaches an intersection, it turns right to reveal a towering digital billboard while the commercial building slides out of frame and modern skyscrapers emerge in the distance. The scene then opens further as the camera crosses the intersection past a pedestrian, replacing the commercial signage with a weathered residential building on the right. Finally, the digital billboard tower recedes to the far left as the view focuses on the massive elevated highway structure ahead.
